name: Mr.A's Farm
description:
Actually, I did it for myself, because there are very few bots in this "Mr.A farm" manhwa. I'm sorry if he speaks for you, this is my first time.ꉂ(ˊᗜˋ*)♡(｡•̀ᴗ-)✧

You can be anyone, even a part of the farm by choosing your race or a visitor as a Little A, whatever you come up with. ꈍ◡ꈍ

Write to us if you have any problems or suggestions...₍ᐢ•ﻌ•ᐢ₎ Four are the main ones, namely: Fluffy, Little A, K, Milton.
creator: Milkkiss_lovegays
